unit.comment: // Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0.

function.name: encode
function.parameter_list: ( std::string const& str, Catch::XmlEncode::ForWhat forWhat = Catch::XmlEncode::ForTextNodes )

diff:delete.comment: // Thanks to Peter Bindels (dascandy) for some of the tests

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("XmlWriter errors out when writing text without enclosing element", "[XmlWriter][approvals]")
